key_features: Mild anemia (Hb 10.5 g/dL) in high-prevalence setting
expectations: Enhanced nutritional supplementation or counseling recommended
Tetanus toxoid vaccination schedule initiated (TT1 with schedule for TT2+)
Psychosocial support or adolescent-friendly services mentioned
key_differences: with_skill: WHO-specific balanced energy/protein supplementation explicitly recommended for undernourished populations; without_skill: only generic dietary advice
with_skill: TT1 initiated at visit with TT2 scheduled in >=4 weeks and vaccination card provided; without_skill: tetanus deferred to 'review and administer as needed'

with_skill: Precise iron dosing (60 mg elemental daily) with population-prevalence reasoning, deworming planned, hemoglobin recheck in 4 weeks; without_skill: vague 'standard prenatal dose', incorrect folic acid dose (5 mg vs 0.4 mg), no deworming, no recheck timeline
with_skill: Structured adolescent-friendly services referral with specific facility resources; without_skill: generic counseling mentioned without adolescent-specific pathway
